title: Non-compliant matching JSON: bottle size 400 mL (blue-cast, level 1, sideways)

form_data.reason: 400 mL is not an approved TTB standard fill size.

image_prompt: Photorealistic medium glass bottle with a rustic orange label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Amber Wave', 'Bourbon Whiskey', '40% Alc./Vol.', '400 mL', 'Distilled and bottled by Wave Distillers, Omaha, NE'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
visualObservation: Readable photo: cool phone-camera color balance but label text remains legible. Camera orientation is sideways (90 degrees).
